meaning: 维多利亚(女子名);n. 四轮折篷马车
examples: Victoria is one of London's busiest stations.
Victoria stood out as a dazzling nonconformist.
The train standing at platform 3 is for London, Victoria.
The company will close 53 stores that trade as Threshers, Victoria Wine, Haddows and Bottoms Up.
Dr Victoria Coker is currently a post-doctoral research associate at the University of Manchester.
